Within hours of the release of EMP: Electromagnetic Pulse, it became a #1 Bestseller on Amazon in six non-fiction genres! texts.full_text: PM comments (5) What is that? It's a duck pond. Why aren't there any ducks? I dunno, there's never any ducks. Then how do you know it's a duck pond? It just is, is it important, the duck pond? Amy asks the Doctor a good question “Is it important, the duck pond?” In this blog I hope to convince you that, yes, the duck pond is very important. Ever since that scene in Matt smith’s debut as the Doctor there has been endless discussion about the significance of the duck pond with no ducks in it. Perhaps even more so than the age old question “Doctor who?”.
